top_repository_name: Ψηφιακό Αποθετήριο της Κεντρικής Βιβλιοθήκης του ΕΜΠ | Dspace@NTUA
Ψηφίδα - Ψηφιακή Βιβλιοθήκη και Ιδρυματικό Καταθετήριο του Πανεπιστημίου Μακεδονίας

content_type_summary: The Academic Repository is dominated by text PDFs, especially Master's theses and doctoral dissertations, with smaller article, book, working-paper, and teaching-material collections. | The Digital Collections branch adds Greek rare monographs and the Kalitsounakis archive; these are text-rich but older and more scan/OCR-heavy than the thesis collections. | The Historical Archive mostly contains yearbooks, study guides, and special university publications; these are useful Greek texts but are less central than core academic research outputs. | The photo archive is currently empty and any image-only or photograph-heavy material should be deprioritized. | A few collections in departmental branches are sparse or empty, so collection-level count checks should be used before any downstream crawl.
latest_summary: The upstream repository at https://pyxida.aueb.gr/ is a DSpace 7 repository with a clean REST surface and stable item/PDF patterns. The highest-value crawl target is the Academic Repository, especially the departmental Master's thesis and doctoral dissertation collections; the historical and digital collections add Greek text value but are more scan/OCR-heavy and should follow after the thesis/dissertation pass.
